_comment: Consumer contract example — terrain_signals.v1. Per-H3-cell terrain signals as read by domain agents and the dashboard. 5 real Bangalore cells showing the full range of terrain types and quality states. TERRAIN_CLASS is agent-derived (present on 4 of 5 cells; null on the void-fill cell pending re-classification).

cells._comment: Central Bangalore — flat plateau, excellent DEM coverage, classified as plain.
SE Bangalore / HSR-Koramangala — slightly lower, gentle south-facing slope. Historically flood-prone street-level but not a valley at H3 res-8 scale.

North Bangalore / Hebbal — adjacent to Hebbal lake. void_fill_applied reduces confidence to 0.65. TERRAIN_CLASS is null because the agent deferred classification for low-confidence cells pending a void-fill review policy decision.
West Bangalore / Kengeri escarpment — steeper terrain, higher ruggedness, classified as hill. suspected_artefact pixel excluded from ELEVATION_M mean before aggregation.
NE Bangalore / Whitefield — highest cell in this sample, east-facing, classified as ridge relative to the city-bbox median.

data_quality_summary.confidence_note: 4 of 5 cells at full confidence (0.90). 1 cell near Hebbal lake has void-filled pixels (confidence 0.65) — TERRAIN_CLASS deferred pending classification policy for low-confidence cells.
data_quality_summary.void_fill_notice: Cell 8860169651fffff contains void-filled DEM pixels adjacent to Hebbal lake. Slope and aspect values for this cell should not be used for precision construction decisions without a field survey.
